title: Zombie Entities
description:
1)Before spawning zombies,it is recommended to switch to night mode in Map.
2)This mod lets you spawn 1 to 5000 zombies at once using a single command.
3)/spawnzombies <amount>
4)Warning: Spawning many zombies (up to 1500) may cause lag or crashes.
body:
This mod lets you spawn 1 to 5000 zombies at once using a single command.

First, place the mod’s jar file only in the mods folder.

1) Command: /spawnzombies <amount>

2) Warning: Spawning large numbers of zombies (over 1000, up to 5000) may cause lag or crashes, especially on PCs with 4GB of RAM or less. Use responsibly.

3) Before spawning zombies, it is recommended to switch to night mode in Minecraft to ensure correct behavior.

4) For best performance, close browsers and other heavy applications before using the command.

5) Spawns zombies instantly, from 1 up to 5000.

6) My Telegram for help: https://t.me/pc_bs
